Title: Create a new user with valid credentials
Preconditions: System is running; no user with the same email exists.
Test Steps:
1. Call `createUser("Mario Rossi", "mario.rossi@example.com", "user123")`.
2. Verify the method returns `true`.
3. Call `getUserInfo()` and confirm the returned list contains all user details.
Expected Result: User is created successfully; `getUserInfo()` returns `[ID: user123, nomeCognome: Mario Rossi, email: mario.rossi@example.com]`.

Title: Create a user with invalid email format
Test Data:
- nomeCognome: "Luigi Bianchi"
- email: "invalid-email" (no @ or domain)
- ID: "user456"
Test Steps:
1. Call `createUser("Luigi Bianchi", "invalid-email", "user456")`.
2. Verify the method returns `false`.
3. Confirm no new user record is created.
Expected Result: User creation fails; system rejects invalid email format.

Title: Check user existence with valid credentials
Check user existence with incorrect ID
Expected Result: User verification fails due to incorrect ID.

Title: Add a device to a user
Preconditions: User "user123" exists; no device with ID "device001" exists.
Test Data:
- User ID: "user123"
- Device ID: "device001"
- Device title: "Greenhouse A"
Test Steps:
1. Call `addDevices("device001")` for user "user123".
2. Verify the method returns `true`.
3. Confirm the device is associated with the user (via system logs or indirect verification).
Expected Result: Device is added successfully; association is established.

Title: Add a device with invalid ID format
Test Steps:
1. Call `addDevices("invalid-device")` for user "user123".
2. Verify the method returns `false`.
3. Confirm no new device is added.
Expected Result: Device addition fails due to invalid ID format.

Title: Set valid configuration parameters for a device
Preconditions: Device "device001" exists and is associated with user "user123".
Test Steps:
1. Call `setMaxTemp(30.0)` for device "device001".
2. Call `setMinTemp(15.0)` for device "device001".
3. Call `setLight(true)` for device "device001".
4. Call `getConfig()` and verify the returned list includes:
   - `max_temp: 30.0`
   - `min_temp: 15.0`
   - `light: true`

Title: Set invalid temperature range (min > max)
Test Steps:
1. Call `setMaxTemp(10.0)` for device "device001".
2. Call `setMinTemp(20.0)` for device "device001".
3. Verify both methods return `false`.
4. Call `getConfig()` and confirm `max_temp` and `min_temp` remain unchanged.
Expected Result: Configuration update fails due to invalid range.

Title: Set negative humidity values
Test Steps:
1. Call `setMaxSoilHum(-5.0)` for device "device001".
2. Call `setMinAirHum(-10.0)` for device "device001".
3. Verify both methods return `false`.
4. Call `getConfig()` and confirm humidity values remain unchanged.
Expected Result: Configuration update fails due to negative values.

Title: Update device history with valid sensor data
Preconditions: Device "device001" exists; no history records exist.
Test Steps:
1. Call `updateHistory("2023-10-01T12:00:00", 45.0, 30.0, 22.5, 500.0)` for device "device001".
2. Verify the method returns `true`.
3. Call `getHistory()` and confirm the returned list includes the new record.

Title: Update history with invalid date format
Test Data:
- date: "invalid-date" (non-standard format)
- air_humidity: 40.0
- soil_humidity: 25.0
- air_temperature: 20.0
- luminosity: 450.0
Test Steps:
1. Call `updateHistory("invalid-date", 40.0, 25.0, 20.0, 450.0)`.
2. Verify the method returns `false`.
3. Call `getHistory()` and confirm no new record is added.
Expected Result: History update fails due to invalid date format.

Title: Update alert message for a device
Preconditions: Device "device001" exists; no alert message is set.
Test Data: - message: "High temperature detected in Greenhouse A"
Test Steps:
1. Call `updateMessage("High temperature detected in Greenhouse A")` for device "device001".
2. Verify the method returns `true`.
3. Call `getMessage()` and confirm the returned string matches the input.

Title: Display list of associated greenhouses
Preconditions: User "user123" has at least one associated device ("device001").
Test Steps:
1. User logs in and clicks "Serre" (greenhouses).
2. System displays "Visualizzazione elenco serre" (list of greenhouses).
3. Verify the list includes "device001" with title "Greenhouse A".
Expected Result: List of greenhouses is displayed correctly.

Title: Display default message when no greenhouses are associated
Test Steps:
1. User logs in and clicks "Serre" (greenhouses).
2. System displays "Visualizzazione messaggio default" (default message).
Expected Result: Default message is shown (e.g., "No greenhouses associated").

Title: Successfully add a device with valid input
Test Steps:
1. User clicks "Add Devices".
2. User enters valid device ID ("device002") and title ("Greenhouse B").
3. System confirms "Operazione eseguita" (operation executed).
Expected Result: Device is added successfully; no errors occur.

Title: Fail to add device with invalid input
Test Steps:
1. User clicks "Add Devices".
2. User enters invalid device ID ("invalid-device").
3. System detects "valore errato" (invalid value) and loops back to input.
Expected Result: Device addition fails; user is prompted to re-enter valid data.

Title: Successfully update device configuration with valid inputs
Preconditions: User "user123" is logged in; device "device001" is connected.
Test Steps:
1. User connects to device "device001".
2. User clicks "Configuration".
3. User enters valid values (max_temp: 28.0, min_temp: 18.0).
4. System confirms "Operazione eseguita" (operation executed).
Expected Result: Configuration is updated successfully; no errors occur.

Title: Fail to update configuration with invalid inputs
Preconditions: User "user123" is logged in; device "device001" is connected.
Test Steps:
1. User connects to device "device001".
2. User clicks "Configuration".
3. User enters invalid values (max_temp: 10.0, min_temp: 20.0).
4. System detects "valore errato" (value error) and loops back to input.
Expected Result: Configuration update fails; user is prompted to re-enter valid data.
